Package com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool

Class ModelTool

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.BaseClass
      • com.enovka.gemini4j.infrastructure.tool.ModelTool
  • public class ModelTool
extends BaseClass
    Singleton class that manages a list of available Gemini models. It loads the models from a JSON file and provides methods for updating the list and searching for models based on their supported generation methods.
    Since:
    0.0.2
    Author:
    Everson Novka <enovka@gmail.com>

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      List<String> findSupportedGenerationMethods​(String modelName)
      Finds all supported generation methods for the specified model.

      Gets the singleton instance of the ModelTool.
      List<Model> getModels()
      Gets the list of available Gemini models.
      boolean isGenerationMethodSupported​(String modelName, String generationMethod)
      Checks if the specified model supports the given generation method.
      void update​(ModelResource modelResource)
      Updates the list of models using the provided ModelResource.
      void update​(List<Model> models)
      Updates the list of models using the provided list of models.

    • Method Detail

      • getInstance

        public static ModelTool getInstance()
        Gets the singleton instance of the ModelTool.
        Returns:
        The singleton instance of the ModelTool.

      • getModels

        public List<Model> getModels()
        Gets the list of available Gemini models.
        Returns:
        The list of available Gemini models.

      • update

        public void update​(ModelResource modelResource)
        Updates the list of models using the provided ModelResource.
        Parameters:
        modelResource - The ModelResource to use for updating the model list.

      • update

        public void update​(List<Model> models)
        Updates the list of models using the provided list of models.
        Parameters:
        models - The list of models to update the model list with.

      • findSupportedGenerationMethods

        public List<String> findSupportedGenerationMethods​(String modelName)
        Finds all supported generation methods for the specified model.
        Parameters:
        modelName - The name of the model to search for.
        Returns:
        A list of supported generation methods for the model, or an empty list if the model is not found.

      • isGenerationMethodSupported

        public boolean isGenerationMethodSupported​(String modelName,
                                           String generationMethod)
        Checks if the specified model supports the given generation method.
        Parameters:
        modelName - The name of the model to check.
        generationMethod - The generation method to check.
        Returns:
        true if the model supports the generation method, false otherwise.
